name: Crushed New Potatoes with Horseradish and Sorrel

ingredients.item: sweet potatoes (about scant 2 lb / 850 g in total)
ingredients.original: 2 sweet potatoes (about scant 2 lb / 850 g in total)

ingredients.amount: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.amount: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Preheat the oven to 190°C. Start with the sweet potatoes. Don’t peel them! Cut them into ¾-inch / 2-cm cubes, spread them out on a baking sheet, and drizzle with the olive oil. Sprinkle with some salt and pepper, mix well with your hands, and then roast in the oven for about 30 minutes, until just tender. Turn them over gently halfway through cooking.
On a separate baking sheet, toast the pecans for 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and chop coarsely.
To make the dressing, whisk together all the ingredients in a small bowl with some salt and pepper. Taste and adjust the seasoning, if necessary.

When the potatoes are ready, transfer them to a large bowl while still hot. Add the green onions, parsley, cilantro, pepper flakes, pecans, and raisins. Pour the dressing over and toss gently to blend, then season to taste. Serve at once or at room temperature.
